sentences.target: On entend une explosion dans la rue.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ dɑ̃ la ry/

translations.fr: On entend une explosion dans la rue.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃tɑ̃ yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ dɑ̃ la ry/
translations.en: We hear an explosion in the street.
translations.es: Oímos una explosión en la calle.
translations.de: Wir hören eine Explosion auf der Straße.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们听到街上有爆炸声。
translations.yue: 我哋喺街度聽到爆炸聲。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nghe thấy một vụ nổ trên đường.
translations.nl: We horen een explosie op straat.
translations.hi: हमें सड़क पर विस्फोट की आवाज़ सुनाई देती है.
translations.nb: Vi hører en eksplosjon i gaten.
translations.sv: Vi hör en explosion på gatan.
translations.da: Vi hører en eksplosion på gaden.
translations.ja: 通りで爆発音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; generic 'one/we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb agreeing with the subject.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'explosion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'entend'.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'rue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Il y a une explosion près du stade.
sentences.reading: /il i a yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ prɛ dy stad/

translations.fr: Il y a une explosion près du stade.
translations.ipa: /il i a yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ prɛ dy stad/
translations.en: There is an explosion near the stadium.
translations.es: Hay una explosión cerca del estadio.
translations.de: In der Nähe des Stadions gibt es eine Explosion.
translations.zh-Hans: 体育场附近发生了一起爆炸。
translations.yue: 體育場附近發生咗爆炸。
translations.pt: Há uma explosão perto do estádio.
translations.vi: Có một vụ nổ gần sân vận động.
translations.nl: Er is een explosie bij het stadion.
translations.hi: स्टेडियम के पास एक विस्फोट हुआ है.
translations.pl: W pobliżu stadionu doszło do eksplozji.
translations.el: Υπάρχει μια έκρηξη κοντά στο στάδιο.
translations.nb: Det er en eksplosjon i nærheten av stadion.
translations.sv: Det är en explosion nära stadion.
translations.da: Der er en eksplosion nær stadion.
translations.ja: スタジアムの近くで爆発が起きている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun in the existential construction 'Il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'Il y a'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; in 'Il y a' expresses existence ('there is/are').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'explosion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase following 'Il y a'.
Preposition; commonly used with 'de' to form the complex preposition 'près de' ('near').
Contraction of the preposition 'de' + definite article 'le'; introduces the complement 'stade'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the prepositional phrase ('près du stade').

sentences.target: La vidéo montre une explosion sur le chantier.
sentences.reading: /la video mɔ̃tʁ yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ syʁ lə ʃɑ̃tje/

translations.fr: La vidéo montre une explosion sur le chantier.
translations.ipa: /la video mɔ̃tʁ yn ɛksplozjɔ̃ syʁ lə ʃɑ̃tje/
translations.en: The video shows an explosion at the site.
translations.es: El video muestra una explosión en la obra.
translations.de: Das Video zeigt eine Explosion auf der Baustelle.
translations.it: Il video mostra un'esplosione nel cantiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 视频显示工地发生爆炸。
translations.yue: 影片顯示工地發生爆炸。
translations.ru: Видео показывает взрыв на строительной площадке.
translations.pt: O vídeo mostra uma explosão no canteiro de obras.
translations.vi: Video cho thấy một vụ nổ tại công trường.
translations.ar: الفيديو يظهر انفجارًا في موقع البناء.
translations.nl: De video toont een explosie op de bouwplaats.
translations.uk: Відео показує вибух на будівельному майданчику.
translations.hu: A videó egy robbanást mutat az építkezésen.
translations.hi: वीडियो में निर्माण स्थल पर एक विस्फोट दिखाया गया है.
translations.pl: Wideo pokazuje eksplozję na placu budowy.
translations.el: Το βίντεο δείχνει μια έκρηξη στο εργοτάξιο.
translations.nb: Videoen viser en eksplosjon på byggeplassen.
translations.id: Video tersebut menunjukkan sebuah ledakan di lokasi konstruksi.
translations.sv: Videon visar en explosion på byggarbetsplatsen.
translations.ro: Videoclipul arată o explozie pe șantier.
translations.da: Videoen viser en eksplosion på byggepladsen.
translations.ja: 動画は工事現場での爆発を映している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'vidéo'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'montre'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'explosion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'montre'.
Preposition marking location ('on/upon').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'chantier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

translations.en: We move away from the explosion.
translations.de: Wir entfernen uns von der Explosion.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tránh xa vụ nổ.
translations.nl: We gaan weg van de explosie.
translations.hi: हम विस्फोट से दूर जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi beveger oss bort fra eksplosjonen.
translations.sv: Vi rör oss bort från explosionen.
translations.da: Vi bevæger os væk fra eksplosionen.
translations.ja: 私たちは爆発から離れていく。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person plural; marks pronominal verb ('s'éloigner').
Present indicative, 1st person plural; pronominal use with 'nous' ('nous éloignons').
Preposition introducing the complement of separation.
Noun with elided definite article 'l'' (from 'le') before vowel; object of the preposition 'de'.
